full_text:
Small piece of ovarian tumor covered by the ovarian capsule. Used all of the sample after the capsule had been cut off. The sample was processed with dispase dissociation media and the following RBC lysis. C&H dissociation was not performed nor any of the following steps because the diagnosis was later corrected as borderline serous.

The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase.

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 4 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++.

The final pellet was resuspended in 4 ml of DMEM/F12+++ for counting.

Cell counts:

| | Dispase
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 6.05
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 3.23
 | viability [%] | 53.4
 | size [µm] | 7.7
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 7.34
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2.97
 | viability [%] | 40.5
 | size [µm] | 7.7
Average | [cells/ml] | 6.695 E6
 | total [cells] | 26.78 E6 in 4 ml
 | viability [%] | 46.95
